name: SAVCA
description: The Southern African Venture Capital and Private Equity Association (SAVCA) is the industry body and public policy advocate for private equity and venture capital in Southern Africa. It represents about R171 billion in assets under management through 181 members and provides research, training, and networking opportunities.

# Unlocking the power of Private Capital to drive growth, innovation, and impact
[ Become a member ](https://savca.co.za/membership/)
## SAVCA Fellowship Programme – 2026 Cohort
[ Learn more ](https://savca.co.za/fellowship-programme/ "Learn more")
###  The SA Venture Capital and Private Equity Association (SAVCA) is the industry body for private capital in Southern Africa.
The SA Venture Capital and Private Equity Association (SAVCA) is the industry body for private capital in Southern Africa.
As a non-profit association with over 200 members, we represent fund managers, investors, advisors, and service providers who collectively manage more than R237 billion across venture capital, private equity, private debt (including mezzanine finance), and other private capital strategies.
Our purpose is simple: to advance and champion the private capital industry by creating an environment where investment and growth can thrive.
[ Learn more about us ](https://savca.co.za/about-savca/)
* ### [Benefits of being a Member ](https://savca.co.za/membership/)
* ### [Events ](https://savca.co.za/events/)
* ### [Training ](https://savca.co.za/training-programmes/)
* ### [Data Intelligence ](https://savca.co.za/data-intelligence/)
* ### [Strategic Initiatives ](https://savca.co.za/investingforgrowth/)
Members benefit from the extensive work done by SAVCA in representing the private capital industry to policymakers, regulators, and legislators.
### Be part of the voice that drives change.
## Why become a SAVCA member?
[ The benefits of being a SAVCA member ](https://savca.co.za/membership/)

##  SAVCA Industry Awards March 2027
Our Industry Awards recognise the businesses that demonstrate the true impact of private capital.
These are the companies that have not only grown but thrived – supported by more than just funding. From strategic guidance to governance, mentorship, and market access, these success stories showcase the full value of private capital.
Judged by respected industry leaders, the awards celebrate innovation, resilience, and the transformative power of investment across Southern Africa.
####  REGISTRATION OPENS IN SEPTEMBER
CLOSE
![Events SAVCA PE Conference 2026](https://savca.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Events-SAVCA-PE-Conference-2026.webp)
![SAVCA's Role 02](https://savca.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/SAVCAs-Role-02.webp)
##  SAVCA Private Equity (PE) Conference March 2027
Our Private Equity Conference is the cornerstone gathering of the industry where relationships are built, ideas are challenged, and the role of private equity in driving economic and social progress takes centre stage.
Through high-impact discussions and curated content, the conference:
* Connects key players across the ecosystem, from investors to policymakers
* Showcases the value of private equity as a driver of growth and development
* Strengthens industry knowledge and capacity through engaging, relevant dialogue
####  REGISTRATION FOR 2027 CONFERENCE OPENS IN OCTOBER
CLOSE
![Events SAVCA VC Conference 2024](https://savca.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Events-SAVCA-VC-Conference-2024.webp)
![SAVCA's Role 02](https://savca.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/SAVCAs-Role-02.webp)
##  SAVCA Venture Capital Conference September 2026
Our annual Venture Capital Conference shines a spotlight on one of the most dynamic and fast-evolving segments of private capital.
It brings together the venture ecosystem to explore trends, share insights, and amplify the role of venture capital in shaping the future.
The conference:
* Highlights key developments and opportunities within the VC landscape
* Promotes venture capital as a critical asset class in the region
* Creates a platform for meaningful networking and knowledge exchange
* Strengthens relationships across investors, regulators, and industry stakeholders
####  REGISTRATION OPENS IN MAY
CLOSE
##  **WARNING:**
PHISHING SCAMS ON TELEGRAM GUISED AS SAVCA TRANSACTIONS!
We are aware of the phishing scams, guised as official SAVCA financial transactions, currently taking place on the social media site, Telegram. We are investigating the matter to determine the most effective way to put a stop to these cybercrimes. Please note that SAVCA is not a financial institution and therefore does not handle financial transactions such as deposits, loans, investments, and currency exchange. We will not, under any circumstance, request money for these purposes. If you receive any suspicious SAVCA related communication, please do not respond and immediately email info@savca.co.za.
CLOSE
